data.title: Proximar Seafood AS Insider Share Transaction
data.description:
Proximar Seafood AS ( (DE:84Q) ) has issued an update.

Proximar Seafood AS announced a transaction involving its primary insiders, where Vivian Lunde, Director ESG & Business Operations, sold 95,000 shares to board member Elisabeth A. Dyvik at a price of NOK 3.445 per share. This transaction was necessitated by Ms. Lunde’s new position outside the company, which prevents her from owning shares in Proximar. This change in shareholding reflects compliance with regulatory requirements and may impact the company’s governance structure.

More about Proximar Seafood AS

data.title: Pasquarelli Auto Announces Shareholders’ Meeting for 2025
data.description:
Pasquarelli Auto SpA ( (IT:PSQ) ) just unveiled an update.

Pasquarelli Auto S.p.A. has announced the publication of the notice for its Ordinary Shareholders’ Meeting, scheduled for April 28, 2025, with a second call on April 29, 2025, if necessary. The meeting will deliberate on the approval of the financial statements for 2024 and the allocation of the operating result. Shareholders can attend in person or by proxy, with provisions for audio/video connection. The announcement underscores the company’s commitment to transparency and shareholder engagement, potentially impacting its market perception positively.

More about Pasquarelli Auto SpA

Pasquarelli Auto S.p.A. is a mobility provider engaged in the trade of new and used cars and commercial vehicles under its brand SecondLife. The company also offers short, medium, and long-term rentals, as well as assistance and sale of spare parts. It is listed on the Euronext Growth Milan market.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

data.title: Chemplast Sanmar Ensures Regulatory Compliance with SEBI Regulations
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Chemplast Sanmar Limited ( (IN:CHEMPLASTS) ).

Chemplast Sanmar Limited has submitted a certificate to the stock exchanges in compliance with Regulation 74(5) of SEBI (Depositories and Participants) Regulations, 2018, for the quarter ending March 31, 2025. This submission, facilitated by KFin Technologies Limited, confirms the details of securities dematerialized or rematerialized during the specified period, ensuring transparency and regulatory compliance for the company’s stakeholders.

data.title: INEO Tech Corp. Faces Shareholder Meeting Requisition
data.description:
INEO Tech Corp. ( (TSE:INEO) ) has provided an announcement.

INEO Tech Corp. has received a requisition from COENDA Investments Holding Corp. for a general meeting of shareholders to potentially make changes to the Board of Directors. The company is currently reviewing the requisition to ensure compliance with the Business Corporations Act of British Columbia and will respond accordingly within the stipulated timeframe.

More about INEO Tech Corp.

INEO Tech Corp., headquartered in Surrey, Canada, operates through its subsidiary INEO Solutions Inc., providing digital advertising and analytics solutions for retailers. The company integrates digital screens with theft detection sensor gates at retail store entrances, utilizing IoT and AI technology to deliver customized advertising. INEO also offers a SaaS-based solution for larger retail chains and is publicly traded on the TSX-Venture Exchange and OTCQB-Venture Market.

data.title: PanGenomic Health Seeks MCTO Amid Financial Filing Delays
data.description:
An announcement from PanGenomic Health, Inc. Class A ( (TSE:NARA) ) is now available.

PanGenomic Health Inc. has applied for a management cease trade order (MCTO) due to its inability to file audited financial statements by the April 30, 2025 deadline, caused by delays in paying its auditors. The company is negotiating financing to resolve the issue and anticipates filing by June 30, 2025. If granted, the MCTO will restrict trading by the CEO and CFO but not the general public, potentially impacting the company’s financial transparency and stakeholder trust.

Spark’s Take on TSE:NARA Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:NARA is a Underperform.

The overall stock score is driven by severe financial instability, with no revenue generation and increasing net losses. Technical analysis provides a mixed picture, suggesting potential short-term recovery but still reflecting overall negative momentum. The negative P/E ratio and lack of dividend yield further decrease the stock’s attractiveness.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:NARA stock, click here.

More about PanGenomic Health, Inc. Class A

PanGenomic Health is a precision health company that has developed a self-care digital platform to deliver personalized, evidence-based information about natural treatments, with an initial focus on supporting mental health. As a British Columbia benefit company, its mission is to enhance health and wellness by providing technology that identifies plant-based solutions tailored to individual health profiles.

YTD Price Performance: 66.67%

Average Trading Volume: 25,109

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: C$1.34M

data.title: Innventure, Inc. Reports 2024 Financial Results
data.description:
Innventure, Inc. ( (INV) ) has released its Q4 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Innventure, Inc. presented to its investors.

Innventure, Inc., a technology commercialization platform, focuses on transforming sustainable technology solutions from multinational corporations into scalable businesses, aiming for significant industry disruption. The company recently reported its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024, marking a pivotal year with the commencement of revenue generation from Accelsius and AeroFlexx and the establishment of a new venture, Refinity, in collaboration with The Dow Chemical Company. Key financial highlights include a substantial increase in total assets to $905 million, driven by significant investments and the public listing of the company. Despite a net loss of $70 million for the quarter, Innventure’s strategic moves, such as the business combination and the launch of Refinity, underscore its commitment to long-term growth. Looking ahead, Innventure’s management remains optimistic about 2025, anticipating further developments and growth as a publicly traded entity, continuing its mission to commercialize breakthrough technologies.

data.title: MTY Food Group Reports Resilient Q1 2025 Results
data.description:
Mty Food Group ( (MTYFF) ) has released its Q1 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Mty Food Group presented to its investors.

MTY Food Group Inc., a leading global franchisor and operator of multiple restaurant concepts, reported its financial results for the first quarter of fiscal 2025, showcasing resilience despite challenging conditions.

MTY Food Group’s first quarter results for fiscal 2025 highlight a modest increase in normalized adjusted EBITDA and system sales, despite facing adverse weather conditions and a leap year impact. The company declared a quarterly dividend of $0.33 per share, reflecting its commitment to returning value to shareholders.

Key financial metrics for the quarter include a 1% increase in normalized adjusted EBITDA to $60.2 million and a 2.5% rise in system sales to $1.36 billion. Cash flows from operations improved due to lower interest payments, while free cash flows net of lease payments saw a significant increase. However, net income attributable to owners dropped sharply due to foreign exchange losses.

MTY’s strategic focus remains on expanding its footprint and enhancing its operational efficiencies. The company repurchased shares and reduced long-term debt, demonstrating financial discipline. Management anticipates a stronger pace of location openings in the coming quarters, supported by robust demand and favorable seasonal trends.

Looking ahead, MTY Food Group remains optimistic about its growth prospects, with plans to drive margin improvement through unit growth and operational efficiencies. The company is prepared to navigate potential challenges, including tariff impacts, by leveraging its strong supply chain and strategic initiatives.

data.title: Intellabridge Postpones AGM to Ensure Shareholder Participation
data.description:
Intellabridge Technology ( (TSE:KASH) ) just unveiled an update.

Intellabridge Technology Corporation has postponed its Annual General Meeting to May 12, 2025, due to some shareholders not receiving their proxy materials in time. The company is committed to ensuring all shareholders can participate fully by reissuing materials and accepting proxy forms via email, underscoring its dedication to good governance and shareholder rights.

More about Intellabridge Technology

Intellabridge Technology Corporation is a fintech company focused on social and environmental impact. Its primary product, Karma, aims to make transactions beneficial by offering cashback solutions and enabling automated donations to charitable organizations aligned with the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals. The platform allows users to link their debit or credit cards to earn cashback on purchases, which are then directed to charities, promoting positive change.

data.title: CULT Food Science Corp. Settles Debts with Share Issuance
data.description:
Cult Food Science Corp. ( (TSE:CULT) ) has issued an announcement.

CULT Food Science Corp. has entered into debt settlement agreements to resolve outstanding debts totaling $23,035 with two arm’s-length creditors by issuing 650,706 shares at a deemed price of $0.0354 per share. This strategic move is intended to preserve the company’s cash for working capital, reflecting the board’s decision to prioritize financial stability and operational efficiency.

Spark’s Take on TSE:CULT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:CULT is a Underperform.

Cult Food Science Corp.’s overall stock score reflects significant financial difficulties, primarily driven by negative profitability and cash flow challenges. Despite a strong equity position, the company’s reliance on external financing and lack of revenue growth are major concerns. Technical indicators show some short-term positive momentum, but long-term caution remains due to the negative P/E ratio and lack of dividends, making the stock less attractive to investors.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:CULT stock, click here.

More about Cult Food Science Corp.

CULT Food Science is a disruptive food technology platform focused on the commercialization of lab-grown meat and cellular agriculture. The company aims to reshape the global food industry through its investments in cutting-edge, venture-backed cellular agriculture and lab-grown meat companies, providing investors access to the future of food.
